Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 
174 
PART_D_LIS_25 
LABEL: 
Part D Low Income Subsidy 25% 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the dollar amount of the Part D low-income subsidy (LIS) where the subsidy level is 
25%. 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
12 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS files) 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
This variable has been retired; therefore, the field is blank after 2023. The Inflation Reduction Act of
